attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_MTL_CROSS_REFERENCES_B)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_MTL_CROSS_REFERENCES_B.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_CROSS_REFERENCES_B.ORGANIZATION_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_CROSS_REFERENCES_B.CROSS_REFERENCE_TYPE, STG_CG1_MTL_CROSS_REFERENCES_B.CROSS_REFERENCE, STG_CG1_MTL_CROSS_REFERENCES_B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_MTL_CROSS_REFERENCES_B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_MTL_CROSS_REFERENCES_B.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_MTL_CROSS_REFERENCES_B.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_MTL_CROSS_REFERENCES_B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_MTL_CROSS_REFERENCES_B.DESCRIPTION, STG_CG1_MTL_CROSS_REFERENCES_B.ORG_INDEPENDENT_FLAG, STG_CG1_MTL_CROSS_REFERENCES_B.REQUEST_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_CROSS_REFERENCES_B.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_CROSS_REFERENCES_B.PROGRAM_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_CROSS_REFERENCES_B.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_MTL_CROSS_REFERENCES_B.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_MTL_CROSS_REFERENCES_B.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_MTL_CROSS_REFERENCES_B.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_MTL_CROSS_REFERENCES_B.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_MTL_CROSS_REFERENCES_B.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_MTL_CROSS_REFERENCES_B.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_MTL_CROSS_REFERENCES_B.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_MTL_CROSS_REFERENCES_B.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_MTL_CROSS_REFERENCES_B.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_MTL_CROSS_REFERENCES_B.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_MTL_CROSS_REFERENCES_B.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CG1_MTL_CROSS_REFERENCES_B.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CG1_MTL_CROSS_REFERENCES_B.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CG1_MTL_CROSS_REFERENCES_B.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_MTL_CROSS_REFERENCES_B.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_MTL_CROSS_REFERENCES_B.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, STG_CG1_MTL_CROSS_REFERENCES_B.UOM_CODE, STG_CG1_MTL_CROSS_REFERENCES_B.REVISION_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_CROSS_REFERENCES_B.CROSS_REFERENCE_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_CROSS_REFERENCES_B.EPC_GTIN_SERIAL, STG_CG1_MTL_CROSS_REFERENCES_B.SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_CROSS_REFERENCES_B.START_DATE_ACTIVE, STG_CG1_MTL_CROSS_REFERENCES_B.END_DATE_ACTIVE, STG_CG1_MTL_CROSS_REFERENCES_B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, STG_CG1_MTL_CROSS_REFERENCES_B.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_MTL_CROSS_REFERENCES_B.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_MTL_CROSS_REFERENCES_B.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_MTL_CROSS_REFERENCES_B.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_MTL_CROSS_REFERENCES_B STG_CG1_MTL_CROSS_REFERENCES_B,
 (
 select  INVENTORY_ITEM_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_MTL_CROSS_REFERENCES_B
 minus
 select  INVENTORY_ITEM_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_MTL_CROSS_REFERENCES_B
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = STG_CG1_MTL_CROSS_REFERENCES_B.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_MTL_CROSS_REFERENCES_B.REFRESH_DATETIME
